subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team.

A short introductory call next week sounds great. Could you please share a couple of specific 30-minute windows that work well for you (including your timezone) between Monday and Thursday? I’ll confirm a slot from our side based on that.

Regarding internal contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I’m not able to share direct phone numbers or personal contact information. Once we’ve had an initial call and better understand the potential fit, I can help coordinate the right stakeholders on our side for any follow-up technical discussions.

Looking forward to your suggested times.

Best regards,
Agent
